description: Verify typed context handoffs preserve identity and provenance, reject private reasoning fields, and require recipient hash acknowledgment.

command: import json,pathlib; p=json.loads(pathlib.Path('agent-system/context-handoff.policy.json').read_text()); assert p['default_mode']=='hybrid'; assert set(p['acknowledgment']['decisions'])=={'accept','request_context','reject'}; assert p['security']['audit_every_delivery_and_acknowledgment'] is True

set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; "$office" loop-start --run-id context-run --agent writer --task 'Prepare a source-backed brief.' >/dev/null; python3 -c 'import json,sys; json.dump({"kind":"digital-office-context-envelope","version":"2.0.0","context_id":"context-run","run_id":"context-run","task_id":"work-context-run","context_version":1,"cycle_index":1,"from":{"type":"agent","id":"writer"},"to":{"type":"agent","id":"researcher"},"goal":"Return cited evidence.","user_intent":"Prepare a source-backed brief.","summary":"Writer needs verified evidence before drafting.","current_stage":"context","constraints":["Use retrievable sources"],"acceptance_criteria":["Researcher returns a cited source list."],"facts":[{"fact_id":"f1","statement":"A source list is required.","status":"verified","confidence":1.0,"basis_refs":["s1"]}],"source_refs":[{"ref_id":"s1","type":"project_file","uri":"project://brief","authority":"verified","retrievable":True}],"artifact_refs":[],"decisions":[],"open_questions":[],"omissions":[],"risk_flags":[],"permissions":{"tenant_id":"t1","project_id":"p1","requested_by":"u1","role":"project_manager","allowed_actions":["research"]},"context_budget":{"strategy":"hybrid","estimated_tokens":300,"max_tokens":1000,"compacted":False},"handoff_reason":"Need cited evidence before drafting.","state_hash":"0123456789abcdef"},open(sys.argv[1],"w"))' "$tmp/context.json"; "$office" handoff-create --run-id context-run --handoff-id h1 --from-agent writer --to-agent researcher --stage context --reason 'Need cited evidence before drafting.' --context-file "$tmp/context.json" --acceptance-criterion 'Researcher returns a cited source list.' > "$tmp/handoff.json"; hash=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))["context_hash"])' "$tmp/handoff.json"); "$office" handoff-ack --run-id context-run --handoff-id h1 --received-by researcher --decision accept --expected-context-hash "$hash" > "$tmp/ack.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["status"]=="accepted"; assert data["acknowledgments"][-1]["received_by"]=="researcher"' "$tmp/ack.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); data["chain_of_thought"]="forbidden"; json.dump(data,open(sys.argv[2],"w"))' "$tmp/context.json" "$tmp/invalid.json"; set +e; "$office" handoff-create --run-id context-run --handoff-id h2 --from-agent writer --to-agent researcher --stage context --reason 'invalid private reasoning' --context-file "$tmp/invalid.json" --acceptance-criterion 'Researcher returns a cited source list.' >/dev/null 2>&1; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0
